info.title: dotnet-asyncapi
info.description: AsyncAPI Command Line Tools: Dotnet tool to generate AsyncAPI spec file(s) from dotnet startup assembly.

commands.name: tofile
commands.description: Retrieves AsyncAPI spec from a startup assembly and writes to file.

options.name: --output
options.description: relative path where the AsyncAPI documents will be exported to (Default: "./")

options.name: --doc
options.description: name(s) of the AsyncAPI documents you want to export as configured in your startup class. To export all documents using null. (Default: null)

options.name: --format
options.description: exports AsyncAPI in json and/or yml format (Default: "json")

options.name: --filename
options.description: defines the file name template, {document} and {extension} template variables can be used (Default: "{document}_asyncapi.{extension}")

options.name: --env
options.description: define environment variable(s) for the application. Formatted as a comma separated list of _key=value_ pairs (Default: "")
